answers.answer: C) Between the getDiscount check and markDiscountUsed, a second concurrent request also reads used===false - classic TOCTOU race condition. Reason: Two concurrent requests can both pass the if(!discount || discount.used) check before either calls markDiscountUsed. Both then apply the discount. Fix: Use atomic operations - (1) DB transaction with row-level locking; (2) Atomic UPDATE with WHERE clause (UPDATE discounts SET used=true WHERE code=X AND used=false, check affected rows); (3) Database unique constraint preventing double-use.
